notes: Floor Validation rollup — the Vendor Audit Walk no longer dead-ends on the rack elevation. New _auditWalk_rollup(racks) tallies per-rack PASS/FAIL/FLAG/SKIP from phantom_audit_walk_v1 (matched to deployment racks by id/rackId/name). shiftReport_generate now renders a 'Floor Validation — Vendor Audit' section (racks audited, slots checked, pass/fail/flag/skip totals + per-rack table with verified %), placed before Open Blockers. phantomHandoffExport now includes a vendorAudit rollup for the active deployment in the exported JSON. Read-only over the walk store; no change to the walk UI, capture, or any other subsystem. Edited directly in Claude Code (not from web-Claude sandbox) — sync the sandbox before the next app handback. Three stamps at v1.6.83.
